label: Transparent elephant motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Elephant transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an elephant motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A dignified African savanna elephant in accurate natural anatomy, slate grey wrinkled elephant skin with fine skin creases, broad ears, long ivory tusks with dusty tan warmth, strong column legs, calm grounded posture, subtle dust on feet, natural hide texture, crisp subject edges, distinctive silhouette, no extra animals.
Composition/framing: centered complete side-profile to three-quarter profile cutout with generous padding; full body visible from trunk tip to tail to feet, not cropped. Clean studio lighting that preserves slate grey skin texture and ivory/tan tusk detail. No cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no savanna scene, no grass, no trees, no rocks, no props, no text, no watermark, no second subject, no stylized cartoon, no floor plane, no shadow.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Elephant light-mode design-system board
Input image: Use the visible isolated elephant motif as the source reference for palette, texture, silhouette, and system language.
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Elephant", derived from an elephant motif: slate grey wrinkled skin, ivory tusks, dust tan savanna woodland context, large grounded silhouette, and enterprise-grade calm structure. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible grounded enterprise system.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 high-resolution board, 3840x2160 target, large readable labels, polished product design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Elephant, Elephant, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Sample Usage.
Reference use: Extract palette and interaction language from slate grey elephant hide, ivory tusks, dusty tan earth, savanna woodland muted greens, deep charcoal skin creases, and heavy grounded posture. The board must read as elephant skin texture and stable enterprise UI, not generic safari, beige-only minimalism, or blue corporate default.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Japanese UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, bar chart, line chart, status chips, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style enterprise design system, precise 8px grid, 6px to 8px component radius, warm ivory surfaces, slate grey primary actions, charcoal sidebars, dust tan supporting surfaces, subtle elephant skin wrinkle texture bands, restrained shadows, dense but organized dashboard/catalog UI.
Color palette: slate hide #6f756f, deep crease #2e312d, ivory #f4ead6, dust tan #cdb78f, acacia olive #68765a, warm clay #a47d57, fog surface #f1eee6, enterprise ink #1f211f, pale border #d8d0bf.
Constraints: no generic purple/blue gradients, no neon colors, no beige-only palette, no cartoon elephant, no safari poster, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Elephant", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Elephant dark-mode design-system board
Input images: Use the visible isolated elephant motif and visible light-mode board as source references. Preserve the same system identity and sections while translating it to dark mode.
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Elephant". It must feel like the same light-mode elephant enterprise system translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from elephant skin texture, slate grey hide, ivory tusks, dust tan savanna woodland context, and calm grounded enterprise structure.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 high-resolution board, 3840x2160 target, large readable labels, polished product design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Elephant, Elephant, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Sample Usage.
Reference use: Preserve the elephant system language: charcoal and deep slate backgrounds, ivory foreground text, slate hide active states, acacia olive focus rings, dust tan chart highlights, deep crease borders, subtle elephant wrinkle texture panels, heavy grounded information hierarchy. Must read as elephant skin and stable enterprise UI, not generic safari, blue corporate default, or plain black dashboard.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Japanese UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, bar chart, line chart, status chips, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: deep charcoal-slate backgrounds, velvety dark cards, ivory text and hairline dividers, slate grey controls, olive focus rings, tusk ivory highlights, tan chart accents, restrained contrast, crisp shadcn/tweakcn components, 8px grid, 6px to 8px radius.
Color palette: night crease #181a17, deep slate #2e342f, slate hide #747b74, elephant ivory #f4ead6, dust tan #cdb78f, acacia olive #6f7b5d, warm clay #a47d57, dark border #44483f, muted fog text #d8d0bf.
Constraints: no neon colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no cartoon elephant, no safari poster, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Elephant".
